all_pieces_in_mill_count: {mill_rule_text} How many pieces belong to at least one mill in total?
Count all pieces that are part of a mill. {mill_rule_text}
{mill_rule_text} What is the total number of pieces that belong to a mill?
Looking at both colors together, how many pieces are in a mill? {mill_rule_text}
How many visible pieces belong to at least one mill overall? {mill_rule_text}
white_mill_completion_point_count: {mill_rule_text} How many empty points would complete a mill for white if white placed one piece there?
Count the empty points where placing one white piece would complete a mill. {mill_rule_text}
{mill_rule_text} What is the number of empty points that would complete a white mill?
For white, how many empty board points are one piece away from a mill? {mill_rule_text}
How many empty points could white use to complete a mill? {mill_rule_text}
black_mill_completion_point_count: {mill_rule_text} How many empty points would complete a mill for black if black placed one piece there?
Count the empty points where placing one black piece would complete a mill. {mill_rule_text}
{mill_rule_text} What is the number of empty points that would complete a black mill?
For black, how many empty board points are one piece away from a mill? {mill_rule_text}
How many empty points could black use to complete a mill? {mill_rule_text}

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_single_board: a Nine Men's Morris board with light and dark pieces placed on intersections
code_prompt_defaults.mill_rule_text: A mill is three same-color pieces on one straight line. Count each piece only once even if it belongs to more than one mill.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_all_pieces_in_mill_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each piece that belongs to at least one mill
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_white_mill_completion_po: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every empty point where placing one white piece would complete a mill
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_black_mill_completion_po: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every empty point where placing one black piece would complete a mill
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_all_pieces_in_mill_count: set "answer" to the total number of pieces that belong to at least one mill
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_white_mill_completion_point_: set "answer" to the number of empty points where placing one white piece would complete a mill
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_black_mill_completion_point_: set "answer" to the number of empty points where placing one black piece would complete a mill
